name: frontend-design
tagline: Design-lead guidance for building distinctive, non-templated web UI: color/type/layout tokens, motion, copy, and a self-critique process.
verdict: Safe, well-scoped design-guidance skill: no network calls, secrets, destructive ops, or manipulation attempts; compact single-file SKILL.md with valid frontmatter. Weaknesses: no NOT-for/exclusion guidance despite overlap with adjacent UI/artifact skills, no worked example for its required token-system format, no explicit output-contract shape/location, and.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion text anywhere despite overlap with idea-to-mvp, dataviz, artifact-design and other UI-adjacent skills.
Line 43 states a quality floor (responsive, keyboard focus, reduced motion) but no explicit deliverable format, file location, or required sections.
Line 33 requires a bespoke token-system format (4-6 named hex colors, 2+ type roles, ASCII wireframes, signature) with no worked example shown anywhere.
